records.ety: [L. sideritis loadstone, Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/, <?/<?/<?/<?/, of iron, from <?/<?/<?/<?/ iron.]

defs: Carbonate of iron, an important ore of iron occurring generally in cleavable masses, but also in rhombohedral crystals. It is of a light yellowish brown color. Called also sparry iron, spathic iron.
A meteorite consisting solely of metallic iron.
Formerly, magnetic iron ore, or loadstone.
Any plant of the genus Sideritis; ironwort.
